qa_pairs.question: Which papers have a first author listed exactly as author number 1?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder = 1
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which papers entities having at least one related authorship record (linked on papers.paperid = authorship.paperid) with authorder equal to '1'?

qa_pairs.question: Which papers have an author listed as number 3 or later in the authorship order?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT papers.paperid FROM papers
JOIN authorship ON papers.paperid = authorship.paperid
WHERE authorship.authorder >= 3
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which papers entities having at least one related authorship record (linked on papers.paperid = authorship.paperid) with authorder at least '3'?
